name: HWR_LOOKUP_VL
query: SELECT B.LOOKUP_ID, B.LOOKUP_TYPE_ID, LTB.LOOKUP_TYPE_CODE as LOOKUP_TYPE, B.LOOKUP_CODE, B.IS_SEEDED_DATA, B.DISPLAY_TEXT, B.TRANS_ID, B.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM HWR_LOOKUP_B B, HWR_LOOKUP_TYPE_B LTB WHERE LTB.LOOKUP_TYPE_ID = B.LOOKUP_TYPE_ID
